pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyhs2pyHS2 is a python client driver for connecting to hive server 2.See example.py for an example of how to use it.Please log all issuesnew feature requests under the issues tab and I will respond ASAP.Contact bradruderman or bradrudermangmail.com with questions.Enjoy[alt tag](httpsrs.gwallet.comr1pixelx11399)
